sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check earlier transitions to find when the dark square moved
for i in range(min(18, len(transitions))):
    t = transitions[i]
    seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 14:
            b = n['boundary']
            if any(b[j][1] < 30 for j in range(len(b))):
                print(f"After transition {i} ({t.action}): dark square at boundary={b}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
